pricingTemplate.title: Simple pricing that scales with usage, not complexity.
pricingTemplate.description: Choose monthly for flexibility or yearly for the best unit economics. Every plan includes shared projects, role-based access, and workflow analytics.

growthFootnote.name: Featured Footnote
growthFootnote.content: Yearly customers get advanced insights and priority onboarding included.
